task: T48 — Map-entity content tail (hazard/props/ambient/music): port misc_laser, the models.qc decoration-prop family, func_pointparticles/func_sparks, func_rain/func_snow; close the remaining target_music gaps. target_speaker + target_music/trigger_music + MusicPlayer are ALREADY landed — this task adds the missing four families plus client render nodes.
baseBehaviors: misc_laser spawnfunc (Base qcsrc/common/mapobjects/misc/laser.qc:215-288): end-effect cnt resolution — mdl=='none' → cnt=-1; mdl set → _particleeffectnum(mdl) with fallback particleeffectnum(EFFECT_LASER_DEADLY) when dmg!=0 (laser.qc:217-236; EFFECT_LASER_DEADLY = effectinfo 'laser_deadly', Base qcsrc/common/effects/all.inc:221 — already registered port-side at EffectsList.cs:207); legacy 'colormod' aliases beam_color (238-242); beam_color defaults '1 0 0' only when beam_color=='0 0 0' AND alpha==0 (244-248); message defaults 'saw the light', message2 'was pushed into a laser by' (250-257); scale defaults 1, modelscale<0 clamps to 0 (258-269); think=misc_laser_think nextthink=time (270-271); enemy = find(targetname == this.target) at INITPRIO_FINDTARGET (51-55, 272); mangle=angles (274); use=laser_use(toggle) only when targetname set (280-284); reset=generic_netlinked_reset → targetname set: active iff spawnflags&START_ENABLED(BIT0=1), else always ACTIVE_ACTIVE (triggers.qc:76-95, defs.qh:6)

misc_laser_think (laser.qc:58-121) ORDER: nextthink=time; if ACTIVE_NOT return; misc_laser_aim (12-49: enemy+FINITE → mangle=enemy.origin; enemy infinite → mangle=vectoangles(enemy.origin-origin) with a_x negated; no enemy → mangle=angles); endpoint o = enemy.origin (FINITE) / origin+normalize(enemy.origin-origin)*LASER_BEAM_MAXLENGTH(32768, laser.qh:32) / makevectors(mangle) forward*32768; traceline(origin,o,MOVE_NORMAL,this) ONLY when (dmg || enemy.target!='') (83-88); DETECTOR (enemy.target!='', 90-111): trace_ent.iscreature && latch count==0 → count=1 + SUB_UseTargets(this.enemy, this.enemy.pusher, NULL); !iscreature && count==1 → count=0 + SUB_UseTargets AGAIN — fires on BOTH enter AND exit edges (toggle semantics); DAMAGE (113-120): team gate `if(this.team) if(((spawnflags&LASER_INVERT_TEAM)==0)==(this.team!=hitent.team)) return` — EXACT truth table: no INVERT(BIT3=8) → return when teams DIFFER (damages only same-team); INVERT → return when teams MATCH; then if hitent.takedamage: Damage(hitent,this,this, dmg<0 ? 100000 : dmg*frametime, DEATH_HURTTRIGGER, DMG_NOWEP, trace_endpos, '0 0 0') — dmg is damage-per-SECOND, dmg<0 instakill 100000. Spawnflags: START_ON=1, LASER_FINITE(DEST_IS_FIXED)=BIT1=2, LASER_NOTRACE=BIT2=4, LASER_INVERT_TEAM=BIT3=8 (laser.qh:16-18)

Draw_Laser CSQC (laser.qc:291-340): skip if ACTIVE_NOT; FINITE → endpoint=networked enemy origin (NOTRACE skips the trace); infinite → client traceline origin+forward*32768, sky hit extends to MAXWORLDSIZE 1048576; beam = Draw_CylindricLine(origin, endpos, scale, 'particles/laserbeam', sliding tc time*3, beam_color, alpha>0 ? (alpha, DRAWFLAG_NORMAL) : (0.5, DRAWFLAG_ADDITIVE)) (322-332); wire-decode bases: scale = 2*(byte/16), dlight modelscale = 50*(byte/16) (laser.qc:369-374); on non-sky hit: __pointparticles(cnt, endpos, plane_normal, drawframetime*1000) + adddynamiclight(endpos+normal, modelscale, beam_color*5) (333-339). particles/laserbeam.tga is present in the port assets (assets/data/xonotic-data.pk3dir/particles/laserbeam.tga)

models.qc family (Base qcsrc/common/mapobjects/models.qc:173-218): g_model_init(ent,sol) — if !scale scale=modelscale; if !solid solid=sol, else solid<0 → SOLID_NOT (mapper 'solid -1' key forces non-solid); SetBrushEntityModel AFTER solid; use=g_model_setcolormaptoactivator (17-29: teamplay → colormap=(actor.team-1)*0x11 else floor(random()*256), |BIT(10)); drop-to-floor at INITPRIO_DROPTOFLOOR per spawnflags&3 (65-82): 1=ALIGN_ORIGIN traceline origin→origin-'0 0 4096' MOVE_NOMONSTERS, setorigin(endpos); 2=ALIGN_BOTTOM tracebox(mins/maxs); 3=traceline then endpos - '0 0 1'*mins.z. Classname table (207-218): misc_gamemodel/misc_models/misc_clientmodel FLIP PITCH first (angles_x = -angles.x) then SOLID_NOT; func_illusionary/func_clientillusionary SOLID_NOT brush; func_wall/func_clientwall/func_static SOLID_BSP brush. g_model_init variants are SVQC-only (NOT Net_LinkEntity'd — they ride the engine's default entity network); g_clientmodel_init variants additionally Net_LinkEntity ENT_CLIENT_WALL (186-204) carrying colormap/skin, origin, angles, modelindex|LOD trio, solid, scale*256, mins/maxs, bgmscript+ADSR, fade_start, fade_end, alpha_max*256, alpha_min*256, inactive, fade_vertical_offset (100-171)

Ent_Wall_PreDraw fade (models.qc:224-259): alpha=0 when .inactive or !checkpvs(view); else when fade_start||fade_end: dist = |view - origin - 0.5*(mins+maxs) + '0 0 fade_vertical_offset'|; fade_end==fade_start → alpha=0 beyond fade_start (hard cutoff); else alpha = (alpha_min + alpha_max * bound(0,(fade_end-dist)/(fade_end-fade_start),1)) / 100.0 — alpha_min/alpha_max are PERCENT (the /100 is load-bearing); alpha < ALPHA_MIN_VISIBLE → drawmask 0

func_pointparticles spawnfunc (Base qcsrc/common/mapobjects/func/pointparticles.qc:93-127): model set → brush volume (modelindex, mins/maxs); mdl set → cnt=0 (effect resolved BY NAME client-side); defaults — atten ATTEN_NORM(0.5) when 0 / negative→0(global), volume 1, count 1, impulse 1 (102-106); no modelindex → setorigin(origin+mins), setsize('0 0 0', maxs-mins) (108-112); setactive=generic_netlinked_setactive, legacy use-toggle when targetname, reset=generic_netlinked_reset (targetname → active iff spawnflags&1; else always on); think networks origin moves. Spawnflags: START_ON=BIT0=1, PARTICLES_IMPULSE=BIT1=2 (absolute burst of .impulse on toggle-on only), PARTICLES_VISCULLING=BIT2=4 (pointparticles.qh:4-5). func_sparks (129-146): count<1→25, impulse<0.5→2.5, mins/maxs zeroed, velocity '0 0 -1', mdl 'TE_SPARK'

Draw_PointParticles CSQC (pointparticles.qc:166-233): emission rate n = bgm(=1 w/o bgmscript) * impulse * drawframetime (per second); wire impulse<0 → RELATIVE density: impulse *= -volx*voly*volz/(64^3) particles per 64³ cube (320-328); PARTICLES_IMPULSE → ABSOLUTE_ONLY_SPAWN_AT_TOGGLE: burst of .impulse particles exactly on toggle-on (174-180, 330-331); just_toggled forces ≥1 particle; per particle: random point in box, must pass WarpZoneLib_BoxTouchesBrush(point-in-brush test, volume case retries ≤64n); movedir!=0 → traceline(p, p+normalize(movedir)*4096) and emit at surface with velocity = plane_normal*|movedir| + .velocity + randomvec()*.waterlevel (jitter), else emit at p with .velocity + jitter; count = per-emission multiplier; .noise plays at spawn point on CH_AMBIENT at VOL_BASE*volume/atten (219-223)

func_rain/func_snow (Base qcsrc/common/mapobjects/func/rainsnow.qc:31-97): dest=.velocity key, defaults '0 0 -700' rain / '0 0 -300' snow; cnt (palette colorbase) default 12; count default 2000, clamp [1,65535] — 'this many particles fall every second for a 1024x1024 area'; brush volume via SetBrushEntityModel; SVQC Net_LinkEntity sends state(rain=0/snow=1), origin+mins, size, compressed dest vector, count, cnt byte, fade_end (5-18). CSQC Draw (101-119): drawdist = fade_end ? fade_end : autocvar_cl_rainsnow_maxdrawdist (default 1000, shipped seta xonotic-client.cfg:999); effbox = volume ∩ (view ± drawdist); mycount = bound(1, 0.1*count*(sx/1024)*(sy/1024), 65535); per frame te_particlerain/snow(box, velocity, floor(mycount*drawframetime+random()), cnt). DP CL_ParticleRain (Base/darkplaces/cl_particles.c:2088-2143): rain count×4, size 0.5, alpha rand 32-64, pt_rain spark-stretch; snow size 1.0, alpha 64-128 billboard; color = particlepalette[colorbase+(rand&3)]; lifetime = fall-height/|dirz|; gated by cl_particles_rain/snow (default 1), scaled by cl_particles_quality (default 1). NOTE: NO shipped Xonotic map uses func_rain/func_snow (scanned all 31 BSPs in xonotic-20230620-maps.pk3) — lowest priority

target_speaker (Base qcsrc/common/mapobjects/target/speaker.qc:77-136): spawnflags LOOPED_ON=1/LOOPED_OFF=2/GLOBAL=4(legacy→atten -1)/ACTIVATOR=8 (speaker.qh:4-7); atten 0 → ATTEN_NORM(0.5) if targetname else ATTEN_STATIC(2); atten<0 → 0 (global); volume default 1; VOL_BASE=0.7; targetname → use handlers on CH_TRIGGER_SINGLE (looped toggle swaps use on/off; one-shot replays); no targetname + LOOPED_ON or neither flag → ambientsound + delete entity. ALREADY PORTED: TargetSpeaker.cs (registered MapObjectsRegistry.cs:117) — parity gaps: ACTIVATOR per-client MSG_ONE plays to all; '*' playersound prefix unsupported; uses SoundChannel.Body instead of CH_TRIGGER_SINGLE

target_music/trigger_music (Base qcsrc/common/mapobjects/target/music.qc): SVQC target_music sends (etof id, volume*255*is, fade_time*16, fade_rate*16, lifetime byte, noise string) (31-40); no targetname = map default (sent MSG_INIT is=true); use → send to activator + spectators chasing them (59-72). CSQC TargetMusic_Advance (179-214): priority best = music_default, OVERRIDDEN by music_target only while time < music_target.lifetime, OVERRIDDEN by music_trigger; per-source volume ramps up by frametime/fade_time toward 1 and down by frametime/fade_rate toward 0; final vol = state*volume*bgmvolume on CH_BGM_SINGLE ATTEN_NONE. Ent_TriggerMusic_Think (273-284): each draw frame, player bbox inside brush → music_trigger=this; trigger_music spawnflags&START_DISABLED(1) starts off, relays toggle. bgmvolume is a DP ENGINE cvar default '1' (Base/darkplaces/snd_main.c:165). ALREADY PORTED: TargetMusic.cs + game/client/MusicPlayer.cs (wired NetGame.cs:718-770 + GameDemo.cs:571-596); REMAINING GAPS: (a) target_music .lifetime window not modeled (override should expire), (b) MusicPlayer reads fade from e.Speed — the real 'fade_time'/'fade_rate' map keys are never plumbed (MusicPlayer.cs:149,175), (c) untargeted target_music ranks BELOW a triggered one correctly but lifetime never demotes it
portState: MapObjectsRegistry.cs (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/MapObjects/MapObjectsRegistry.cs — THIS task owns it): target_speaker registered :117, target_music/trigger_music :120-121. NONE of misc_laser / misc_gamemodel / misc_models / misc_clientmodel / func_illusionary / func_clientillusionary / func_wall / func_clientwall / func_static / func_pointparticles / func_sparks / func_rain / func_snow are registered — they fall to GameWorld's keep-bare-edict path (GameWorld.cs:1825-1831) and silently no-op

Server spawn path: GameWorld.SpawnMapEntities (GameWorld.cs:1789-1833) → ApplyDictFields (1864-1949) copies only a fixed key set (targetname/target/killtarget/message/model/spawnflags/team/skin/cnt/health/dmg/noise*/volume/atten/speed/wait/lip/height + single-float 'angle' anglehack). NOT plumbed (needed by T48): mdl, velocity, movedir, impulse, waterlevel, beam_color/colormod, alpha, scale, modelscale, solid, fade_start, fade_end, alpha_max, alpha_min, fade_vertical_offset, lifetime, fade_time, fade_rate. Spawnfuncs receive only the Entity (SpawnFuncs, src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/EntityClasses.cs:83-97) — no raw dict access, so new keys MUST be promoted in ApplyDictFields (chokepoint) or via a helper hook. GameDemo has its own twin ApplyMapFields (game/GameDemo.cs:978-996, even fewer keys)

Networking of map entities: ServerNet snapshot loop (game/net/ServerNet.cs:899-957) networks EVERY non-player entity with a non-inline Model as NetEntityKind.Generic (Classify :1068-1090) — so a misc_gamemodel server entity with Model='models/…' ALREADY rides the existing wire (origin/angles/model-name/frame/skin/effects), client renders it via ClientWorld.OnEntityUpdate → EntityNode + NetGame.BuildEntityModel (NetGame.cs:1264-1269, _assets.LoadModel by full path). Inline '*N' models are skipped (:909-910 — drawn statically by MapLoader.BuildMap). A model-less misc_laser is skipped (:917) — good, the laser renders client-side instead. EntityField wire mask (src/XonoticGodot.Net/NetEntity.cs:46-63) has NO Scale field — prop scale cannot reach a remote client without a protocol bump

Collision reality check: BspCollisionBuilder.Build (src/XonoticGodot.Engine/Collision/BspCollisionBuilder.cs:49-99) puts ONLY model 0 in the static CollisionWorld; '*N' submodels collide ONLY via an entity that does SetModel('*N') with Solid.Bsp (TraceService.ClipToEntities, src/XonoticGodot.Engine/Collision/TraceService.cs:199-204). A bare func_wall edict today has Solid.Not + ModelIndex 0 → NO collision (the planning/TODO.md:1114 'collide statically' note is true only for render; stormkeep's 17 func_walls are walk-through in the sim). Registering the models.qc spawnfuncs FIXES this

Client learns about map entities: (a) the Generic snapshot stream (above); (b) ambient-facade scan — the established pattern: TriggerTouch.PredictJumppadsAmbient/PredictTeleportsAmbient (src/XonoticGodot.Engine/Simulation/TriggerTouch.cs:81-162) resolve via Api.Entities.FindByClass, which works on both the demo EngineServices and the listen server's ServerServices wrapper; (c) direct EntityList handoff — MusicPlayer.EntityList = _serverWorld.Services.EntityTable.All (NetGame.cs:759-764, GameDemo.cs:588-591). A pure --connect client has NO BSP yet (NetGame.cs:686-687) so facade-scanned client fx are listen-server-only — consistent with every existing gap

Sound infra LANDED: ISoundService.Play(e, channel, sample, vol, atten, loop, pitch) / PlayAt(point) / Stop(e, channel) (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Services/Services.cs:102-127); SoundWire wire codec carries SourceNetId + Loop/Stop flags + Channel (src/XonoticGodot.Net/SoundWire.cs); ClientWorld looping pool keyed (netId, channel) with 0.5s keepalive + idempotent re-emit (ClientWorld.cs:128-135, OnLoopingSound :628, OnStopSound :665). TargetSpeaker.cs already uses it

Music infra LANDED: game/client/MusicPlayer.cs — two-slot crossfade, Music bus, trigger>target>cdtrack priority, ResolveMusicPath (numbers → cdtracks/trackNNN); wired in NetGame.SetupMusic (NetGame.cs:718-770) + GameDemo (:571-596); cdtrack from mapinfo or worldspawn music/noise (GameWorld.ApplyWorldspawn :1981-1990); music .oggs present (assets/data/xonotic-music.pk3dir/sound/cdtracks/*.ogg); 'Music' bus created by ClientSettings.EnsureChannelBuses. Gaps: lifetime window, fade_time/fade_rate plumb (reads e.Speed at MusicPlayer.cs:149/175 — wrong key), per-activator/spectator sends

Effect/render infra available: EffectSystem (game/client/EffectSystem.cs) — effectinfo.txt-driven (Info catalog :80, EnsureInfoLoaded, BuildFromInfo) with one-shot Spawn(name, origin, velocity, count, color) :198-262 that creates a transient GpuParticles3D PER CALL (fine for bursts, wrong for continuous emitters); particlefont atlas (Font); EffectClass.Beam routes to BeamRenderer (:215-220). BeamRenderer (game/client/BeamRenderer.cs) — Arc/Beam spawn TRANSIENT self-freeing cross-ribbon meshes with lifetime tweens (:52-60, 224-251) — not suitable as-is for a persistent laser (would churn a node per frame). Effects registry has LASER_DEADLY → 'laser_deadly' (EffectsList.cs:207) and effectinfo.txt has the laser_deadly blocks

Damage plumbing: Combat.Damage(target, inflictor, attacker, amount, deathType, hitLoc, force) (src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/Damage/DamageContracts.cs:54-65); the port maps DEATH_HURTTRIGGER → DeathTypes.Void ('fell out of the world / kill volume', DeathTypes.cs:27-28) — trigger_hurt already uses this convention (Triggers.cs HurtTouch). Thinks for MoveType.None entities run server-side every tick when NextThink due (MoveTypePhysics.cs:43-47, SimulationLoop.RunThink:213-237 — QC nextthink=time pattern works as-is); frametime = Api.Clock.FrameTime

Shared map-object helpers ready for reuse: MapMover.FindFirstByTargetName/IndexRegister (targetname index, MapObjectsCommon.cs:202-304), UseTargets/UseTargetsEx (SUB_UseTargets, :328-424), IsCreature (:158-159), SetMovedir/InitTrigger/InitMovingBrushTrigger (:454-498), LogicGates.GenericSetActive (LogicGates.cs:45-51), Entity.SetActive delegate (EntityMapObjectStateExtra.cs:31). Entity partial-class extension pattern established (ADR-0007) — new fields go in NEW files, no Entity.cs edits

Render limitation: EntityNode syncs origin + YAW ONLY, no pitch/roll, no scale (game/EntityNode.cs:43-61) — decoration props with pitch/roll/scale render wrong until extended. ClientWorld._Process is the per-frame client drive (:805-842) with ViewOrigin()/ListenerPos() available; we may touch ClientWorld.cs to host new subsystems

Shipped-map usage census (scanned all 31 BSPs in assets/data/xonotic-20230620-maps.pk3): misc_gamemodel — 15 maps (courtfun 71, techassault 28, space-elevator 22, dance 16, darkzone 16, implosion 15, atelier 11…); func_pointparticles — 6 maps (courtfun 44, techassault 10, stormkeep, glowplant, boil, bromine); func_wall — 5 maps (stormkeep 17); misc_laser — leave_em_behind (9); func_sparks — trident (4); func_illusionary — darkzone 5, finalrage 2; func_clientillusionary — go 8, catharsis 4; func_rain/func_snow/misc_clientmodel/func_clientwall/func_static/target_music/trigger_music — ZERO occurrences. Priority order follows usage: props > pointparticles > func_wall solidity > laser > sparks > weather
plan: 1. NEW src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/MapObjects/MapObjectFieldsExtra.cs (ours): (a) `partial class Entity` adding the content-tail fields — string Mdl (QC .mdl effect name), float Impulse, float ParticleJitter (QC .waterlevel-as-jitter), Vector3 BeamColor, float ModelScale, float ScaleFactor (QC .scale; name avoids clashes), int SolidOverride (raw 'solid' key, 0=unset), float FadeStartDist/FadeEndDist/AlphaMax/AlphaMin/FadeVerticalOffset, float MusicLifetime/MusicFadeIn/MusicFadeOut (QC lifetime/fade_time/fade_rate); (b) `public static void Apply(Entity e, IReadOnlyDictionary<string,string> fields)` parsing keys mdl, velocity (3-float vector → e.Velocity), movedir (vector → e.MoveDir), impulse, waterlevel, beam_color + legacy colormod fallback, alpha (→ existing e.Alpha, but only when key present — Alpha defaults 1, QC laser checks alpha==0 so record presence by parsing into Alpha AND a small HasAlphaKey bool or store raw -1 sentinel… simplest: parse alpha into e.Alpha and ALSO leave QC default-resolution to the spawnfunc using BeamColor=='0 0 0' && alpha key absent → use a float AlphaKey field defaulting 0 instead of touching e.Alpha), scale → ScaleFactor, modelscale → ModelScale, solid → SolidOverride, fade_start/fade_end/alpha_max/alpha_min/fade_vertical_offset, lifetime/fade_time/fade_rate. Invariant-culture floats, same style as GameWorld.ApplyDictFields

2. Hand the GameWorld.ApplyDictFields one-line hook to the orchestrator (see chokepointSnippets); add the SAME one-liner to GameDemo.ApplyMapFields (game/GameDemo.cs:995, NOT a chokepoint — direct edit, additive)

3. NEW src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/MapObjects/Laser.cs — `// Port of qcsrc/common/mapobjects/misc/laser.qc`: LaserSetup spawnfunc reproducing laser.qc:215-288 exactly (cnt/effect-name resolution stored as a STRING field LaserEndEffect since the port resolves effects by name; beam_color/colormod/alpha defaults; message/message2; scale/modelscale defaults; MoveType.None + Think=LaserThink + NextThink=now; Use=toggle via LogicGates.GenericSetActive + SetActive delegate when targetname; Active per generic_netlinked_reset rules; MapMover.IndexRegister). LaserThink: resolve Enemy lazily on first think via MapMover.FindFirstByTargetName(Target) (replaces INITPRIO_FINDTARGET); endpoint per FINITE/enemy/mangle rules with QMath.Forward (use FixedVecToAngles convention per the QMath pitch memory — verify against a pitched laser in leave_em_behind); Api.Trace.Trace(origin, 0,0, o, MoveFilter.Normal, self) gated on (Dmg!=0 || enemy.Target!=''); DETECTOR edge latch on a new bool field (NOT e.Count — that's the plumbed map key) firing MapMover.UseTargets(enemy, null, null) on BOTH edges; damage = Combat.Damage(hit, self, self, Dmg<0 ? 100000 : Dmg*Api.Clock.FrameTime, DeathTypes.Void, hitloc, 0) with the EXACT team-gate expression from laser.qc:115-117. Leave Model empty so ServerNet never networks it

NEW game/client/LaserRenderer.cs — persistent facade-scanning render node (the Draw_Laser successor): each _Process, Api.Entities.FindByClass('misc_laser'); per laser keep one MeshInstance3D cross-ribbon (lift BeamRenderer.BuildCrossRibbon technique into a persistent update-in-place mesh — do NOT spawn/free per frame) textured with particles/laserbeam.tga (TextureLoader), tinted BeamColor, alpha>0 → alpha blend at .Alpha else additive at 0.5; endpoint from a client-side Api.Trace (skip when LASER_NOTRACE: finite→enemy origin, infinite→origin+forward*1048576); hide when Active!=ActiveActive; end-effect: EffectSystem.Spawn(LaserEndEffect, endpos, normal, count≈drawframetime*1000/heuristic) throttled to ≤1 burst node per ~0.1s per laser (transient-node budget), plus one persistent OmniLight3D per laser (range = modelscale base 50 in Quake units → Coords scale, color BeamColor, hidden with the beam). Quake→Godot via Coords.ToGodot at the boundary

NEW src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/MapObjects/MapModels.cs — `// Port of qcsrc/common/mapobjects/models.qc`: GModelInit(e, sol) — ScaleFactor==0 → ScaleFactor=ModelScale; Solid from SolidOverride (0→sol, <0→Solid.Not, else map int 4=Bsp etc.); Api.Entities.SetModel(e, e.Model) AFTER solid (gives '*N' walls real brush collision via TraceService.ClipToBrushModel — fixes stormkeep race barriers); Use=SetColormapToActivator (faithful colormap math, harmless if client ignores); drop-by-spawnflags via Api.Trace (spawnflags&3 cases 1/2/3, MOVE_NOMONSTERS); pitch flip e.Angles.X = -e.Angles.X ONLY for the three misc_* model entities BEFORE init. Eight thin spawnfuncs matching models.qc:207-218 (client* variants behave identically server-side; fade fields ride the entity for the listen-server client read). External-model props (misc_gamemodel) keep Model='models/…' full path from the map key — they network as Generic automatically and render via the existing EntityNode/EntityModelFactory; NO ResolveModelPath prefixing needed (map keys carry full paths, unlike the T35 item defs)

Listen-server reads ScaleFactor off the shared entity; remote clients miss scale until a protocol field lands (deferred — see risks)

Client wiring: instantiate LaserRenderer + MapParticleEmitters + WeatherSystem inside ClientWorld._Ready (we may touch ClientWorld.cs) so BOTH NetGame and GameDemo get them for free (they self-scan the ambient facade like TriggerTouch/MusicPlayer — no NetGame.cs edit needed; gate on Api.Services!=null). Pass ClientWorld's existing TextureLoader/Effects references down
13. Tests (tests/XonoticGodot.Tests, xUnit, parallelism already disabled): LaserTests, MapModelsTests, PointParticlesRainSnowTests, music-lifetime additions to MusicSystemTests — see testPlan

14. Verify: `dotnet build XonoticGodot.csproj` + `dotnet test tests/XonoticGodot.Tests` (Windows dotnet per build memory); headless screenshots — `--map leave_em_behind --screenshot` (lasers), `--map courtfun --screenshot` (71 props + 44 pointparticles), `--map stormkeep` (func_wall collision: walk into a race barrier in DM — it must block; + 1 pointparticles), `--map trident` (sparks). Check the [MapLoader]/console log for unhandled-class count dropping
filesToModify: src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/MapObjects/MapObjectsRegistry.cs (owned this wave — add the 13 classname registrations)
src/XonoticGodot.Common/Gameplay/MapObjects/TargetMusic.cs (read plumbed lifetime/fade fields; stamp activation time in TargetMusicUse)
game/client/MusicPlayer.cs (lifetime window + real fade_time/fade_rate instead of the e.Speed hack at :149/:175)
game/client/EffectSystem.cs (may-touch: expose effectinfo block lookup + a persistent-GpuParticles3D configurator for continuous emitters)
game/client/ClientWorld.cs (may-touch: create/drive LaserRenderer + MapParticleEmitters + WeatherSystem in _Ready/_Process)
game/EntityNode.cs (small additive: full-rotation + scale sync for Generic props — not a chokepoint, but coordinate: other waves touch render glue)
game/GameDemo.cs (one-liner: MapObjectFieldsExtra.Apply in ApplyMapFields :995 — not a chokepoint)
chokepointSnippets: ServerNet.cs — NO change required. The Generic-kind snapshot loop (ServerNet.cs:899-957) already networks external-model props (non-'*' Model, Classify→Generic at :1089), already skips inline-brush walls (:909-910) and model-less lasers (:917). State this so the ServerNet owner doesn't 'helpfully' add laser/particles wiring.

NetProtocol.cs / NetEntity.cs — DEFERRED follow-up only (do NOT do this wave): remote (non-listen-server) clients cannot receive prop scale because EntityField (src/XonoticGodot.Net/NetEntity.cs:46-63) has no Scale bit. If/when a wave owner adds `Scale = 1 << 14` + a `byte floor(scale*16)` field to EntityStateCodec.WriteDelta/ReadDelta, NetProtocol.cs `public const uint ProtocolVersion = 6` (game/net/NetProtocol.cs:50) must bump to 7. T48 sidesteps it: the listen-server client reads ScaleFactor off the shared entity via the facade.

Commands.cs / ClientNet.cs / DamageSystem.cs / Registries.cs — no integration needed. Laser damage goes through the existing Combat.Damage facade (DamageContracts.cs:54, NOT DamageSystem.cs) with deathtype DeathTypes.Void — the same DEATH_HURTTRIGGER mapping trigger_hurt already uses, so obituaries route through existing paths.
risks: Laser team-gate is counterintuitive but must be ported VERBATIM: `((spawnflags&INVERT)==0)==(team!=hitTeam) → return` means a team-stamped laser with no INVERT flag damages only SAME-team touchers (laser.qc:115-117). Do not 'fix' it — write the truth-table test from the expression, not from intuition.

Angle conventions: misc_laser_aim negates pitch (a_x = -a_x, laser.qc:28) before storing mangle, and DP makevectors negates pitch again — per the QMath pitch-convention memory the port's VecToAngles/AngleVectors are intentionally inverse-signed; compute the beam direction as normalize(enemy.origin-origin) directly where possible and use FixedVecToAngles otherwise; visually verify a pitched laser on leave_em_behind before trusting it.

Registering func_wall/func_static with Solid.Bsp + SetModel('*N') turns previously-intangible brush entities SOLID — a behavior change that could reveal latent issues (players standing inside a wall on map load → NudgeOutOfSolid fires; stormkeep's 17 walls). Also confirm gametype-filtered walls stay dropped (MapEntityFilter runs before spawnfuncs, GameWorld.cs:1811) so no collision/render disagreement.

Double-render check for props: inline '*N' brush entities are drawn statically by MapLoader.BuildMap AND are never networked ('*' skip) — fine; external-model props are networked but NOT drawn statically — fine; but a func_wall with BOTH solid entity + static render must not also get an EntityNode (it won't — '*' skip). Keep that invariant when writing MapModels (never clear the '*' model name).

EntityNode full-rotation/scale change (game/EntityNode.cs) affects EVERY Generic networked entity (monsters, turrets, gibs) — pitch on monsters was previously discarded and some models may have baked assumptions; gate the pitch/roll application to non-player kinds and test visually on a vehicle/turret map before landing.

Per-frame cost: one server traceline per misc_laser per tick (only when dmg or detector — laser.qc:83 gate) + one client traceline per visible laser per frame. leave_em_behind has 9 lasers — fine, but keep the client trace behind the NOTRACE flag and an Active check.

Transient-node churn: EffectSystem.Spawn creates a GpuParticles3D per call — never call it per-frame for laser end-effects or pointparticles emission. Persistent emitters (one node per map entity) are the perf approach; throttle laser end-effect bursts (~10 Hz) and cap weather Amount (~4000/volume).

Facade-scanned client fx (laser beam, pointparticles, weather, prop fade) only work on the listen-server/demo paths (Api.Services = the server world). A pure --connect client shows none of them — acceptable (it has no BSP/world either today), but document it in the file headers so it's a known seam, not a silent gap.

Intentionally out of scope (document in headers): bgmscript ADSR animation (models.qc:152-161 + pointparticles), LOD model trio for ENT_CLIENT_WALL, target_speaker '*' playersound prefix + ACTIVATOR MSG_ONE, the PVS check in Ent_Wall_PreDraw (use distance-fade only). None are used by stock maps in ways that block parity.

Wave contention: GameDemo.cs, EntityNode.cs, ClientWorld.cs, EffectSystem.cs are not chokepoints but ARE shared surfaces — keep edits additive (new methods/new node children), never reorder existing logic; the MusicPlayer fade fix changes behavior only when maps actually carry fade keys (none shipped do — regression risk ~0).

MapObjectFieldsExtra parses 'alpha' — do NOT write it into Entity.Alpha blindly: Alpha defaults 1f (DamageEntityState.cs:123) and is consumed by render fade paths; QC laser semantics key off 'alpha key present/0'. Use a separate AlphaKey field (default 0) and let each spawnfunc decide, or props/lasers will all render half-faded.
testPlan: LaserTests.cs (headless facade fixture, same pattern as JumppadTests/TeleportersTests): (1) damage tick = Dmg*FrameTime against a takedamage dummy on the beam (assert via recorded Combat damage or dummy health delta); (2) dmg=-1 → 100000 instakill; (3) Active=Not → no trace/no damage; (4) DETECTOR: creature enters beam → SUB_UseTargets fires once; creature leaves → fires AGAIN (both edges), no refire while latched; (5) team-gate truth table straight from the QC expression (team set, INVERT on/off × same/diff team); (6) FINITE endpoint = enemy.origin vs infinite 32768-unit ray; (7) spawn-default resolution: beam_color '1 0 0' only when color+alpha unset, message defaults, scale/modelscale defaults, mdl='none' → no end effect, dmg!=0 → 'laser_deadly' fallback.

MapModelsTests.cs: (1) drop-by-spawnflags 1/2/3 against a flat-floor CollisionWorld (ALIGN_ORIGIN endpos, ALIGN_BOTTOM via box trace, case-3 mins.z lift); (2) solidity matrix — func_wall '*N' blocks a TraceService trace, func_illusionary/misc_gamemodel do not, 'solid -1' key forces non-solid on func_wall; (3) misc_gamemodel pitch flip (Angles.X negated) and func_* NOT flipped; (4) scale: ScaleFactor==0 inherits ModelScale; (5) colormap use-handler: teamplay activator → (team-1)*0x11 | BIT(10); (6) external-model prop keeps full 'models/…' path on e.Model (the networked-render contract).

PointParticlesRainSnowTests.cs: (1) func_pointparticles defaults (atten 0.5, volume 1, count 1, impulse 1) + box derivation (no model → origin+mins / size maxs-mins); (2) func_sparks defaults (25 / 2.5 / '0 0 -1' / mdl TE_SPARK); (3) toggle: targetname + spawnflag START_ON off→Use→Active flips (generic_netlinked_reset rules: no targetname → always active); (4) func_rain/snow defaults (dest '0 0 -700'/'0 0 -300', cnt 12, count 2000, clamp 1..65535) and the client count formula bound(1, 0.1*count*(sx/1024)*(sy/1024), 65535) as a pure function; (5) every new classname spawns without NRE when Api.Services is null (the bare-test convention all spawnfuncs follow).

MusicSystemTests.cs additions: target_music lifetime — activate a targeted track, advance the clock past lifetime, assert the priority evaluation falls back to default; fade_time/fade_rate plumbed from map keys (not 'speed') reach the MusicPlayer-visible fields.

Field-plumb guard test: build an EntityDict with every T48 key (mdl/velocity/beam_color/scale/fade_*/lifetime/…), run MapObjectFieldsExtra.Apply, assert each field — protects the GameWorld one-line hook contract against the chokepoint owner reverting it.

Manual/visual (run via Windows dotnet + the --map/--screenshot workflow): leave_em_behind — 9 lasers visible (red beams, end-effect, glow), beams stop at walls, walking into a dmg laser hurts; courtfun — 71 misc_gamemodel props textured at correct orientation + 44 pointparticles emitting; stormkeep — func_wall race barriers now BLOCK movement in the matching gametype and stay dropped/passable in the filtered one (compare both gametypes); trident — 4 func_sparks spark fountains; regression sweep: dance/atelier/darkzone screenshots unchanged except added props/speaker ambience.

Full suite: `dotnet build XonoticGodot.csproj` then `dotnet test tests/XonoticGodot.Tests` — all ~1060+ existing tests stay green (especially MapEntityFilterTests, JumppadTests, MusicSystemTests, TargetUtilitiesTests which share the spawn path).
